title: Upgrade, CONNECT, Tunnels, WebSocket Boundaries, and Safe Transitions · Program Defense
summary: A security review compares near-miss parser decisions for upgrade, connect, tunnels, websocket boundaries, and safe transitions and requires the smallest strict confirmed protocol-transition and buffered-byte handoff state machine with changed-input evidence. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for confirmed protocol-transition and buffered-byte handoff state machine. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and…
objectives: Validate Connection upgrade, Upgrade tokens, request completion, status 101, selected protocol, and ownership transfer before switching parsers.
Parse CONNECT authority-form, validate host and port policy, authenticate proxy use, establish the target, then transition after a successful response.
Transfer connection, buffered unread octets, deadlines, close ownership, and cancellation atomically to the selected protocol or tunnel.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Upgrade Handshake · changed case · Quiz Upgrade Handshake
steps.instruction:
quiz case — A quiz protocol team handles case 2012 in a incident replay lab retaining minimized request-smuggling corpora. Build deterministic Go evidence to wait for confirmed Upgrade or CONNECT acceptance before transferring parser ownership; preserve this operating constraint: all attacker-controlled counts must be validated before allocation or slicing; then reject a protocol transition while optimistic bytes are buffered and prevent desynchronization. Browser code models bounded byte and state decisions only. Sockets, listeners, live TLS, proxies, packet capture, fuzz campaigns, races, load, HTTP/2, HTTP/3, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Validate Connection upgrade, Upgrade tokens, request completion, status 101, selected protocol, and ownership transfer before switching parsers.

Which action demonstrates Upgrade Handshake without dropping earlier contracts?

Evidence target: Upgrade Handshake · changed case · Quiz Upgrade Handshake.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for validate connection upgrade, upgrade tokens, request completion, status 101, selected protocol, and ownership transfer before switching parsers. For Upgrade Handshake · changed case · Quiz Upgrade Handshake, keep Upgrade Handshake connected to executable Go behavior evidence.
